Trade.title: Trade
Trade.description: A recorded trading signal and its outcome.

uid.description: The user ID who took the trade.

GlobalStrategy.title: GlobalStrategy
GlobalStrategy.description: A strategy or rule learned from analyzing aggregated trade data.

sourceCount.description: Number of trades analyzed to derive this rule.

AdminSettings.title: AdminSettings
AdminSettings.description: Global system settings only manageable by admins.

maintenanceMode.description: Whether the app is in maintenance mode.

broadcastMessage.description: A message to show to all users.

/users/{uid}/trades/{tradeId}.description: Collection of trades for a specific user.

/global_strategies/{strategyId}.description: Collection of strategies learned from all users' data.
